title: Turku, Southwest Finland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Turku, Southwest Finland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Turku is a city in Southwest Finland with a population of 194,000. Finland’s former capital and oldest city, a historic university town on the Aura River with a medieval castle.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
